title: Reach
shortDefinition: Total number of unique people who see your content or ad.

content.definition: Reach is the total number of unique individuals exposed to your message, content, or advertisement across a platform or channel. It's the raw audience size—how many eyeballs actually see what you're putting out. Without reach, nothing else happens: no engagement, no conversions, no revenue.
content.whyItMatters: Reach is your foundation. You can't convert people who never see your offer. Whether you're building a SaaS, launching a course, or bootstrapping a side project, understanding where your potential customers actually spend time is critical. Most founders waste resources on channels with zero reach instead of identifying where their specific audience lives.
content.howToApply: Start by identifying your target customer's primary channels—if you're B2B SaaS, they might be on LinkedIn and industry forums, not TikTok. Map out your current reach per channel using native analytics. Then deliberately expand reach in high-performing channels before diversifying. Use organic tactics (SEO, content, referrals) to build sustainable reach, while testing paid reach for rapid feedback. IdeaFuel's Research Engine analyzes audience distribution patterns across channels, helping you identify where your market actually congregates.
commonMistakes: Confusing reach with engagement—massive reach with zero engagement wastes resources. Focus on reaching the right people, not just volume.
Pursuing reach on every platform simultaneously—this spreads you thin. Pick 1-2 channels, dominate them, then expand strategically.
Ignoring organic reach opportunities—many founders burn cash on ads before exhausting free traffic sources like SEO and community building.
content.ideafuelConnection: IdeaFuel's Research Engine analyzes market reach patterns and helps you identify where your target audience congregates across channels.

seoTitle: What is Reach? Marketing Metrics Explained | IdeaFuel Glossary
seoDescription: Reach is the total unique people who see your content. Learn why reach matters and how to expand it strategically.
